data.title: Pretium Packaging undertakes capital structure optimization: cuts $900M debt, gains $175M liquidity, secures $50M equity.
data.description: The anticipated transaction aims to decrease funded debt by over $900 million and offer more than $175 million in liquidity via a pre-arranged consensual financial restructuring. Noteworthy backing is provided by the equity sponsor and current lenders, with the addition of a $50 million new equity investment.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures decline, Meta surges, Microsoft drops; Elon Musk plans Tesla CapEx surge after record earnings.
data.description: Several major companies including Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta recently released their earnings reports following a period of record highs in the stock market. Tesla's CEO Elon Musk announced plans for a significant increase in capital expenditures. Dow Jones Futures saw a decrease, with Meta experiencing a rise and Microsoft facing a decline.

data.title: Orca Energy Group Inc. releases independent reserves report for 2025. #energynews #reserves #2025
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The number of new jobs created last month alone totaled 250,000, surpassing all expectations. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 2.5%. Analysts predict continued economic growth in the coming months due to these positive indicators.

data.title: McEwen Inc. to acquire Golden Lake Exploration Inc., further consolidating Gold Bar Mine Complex in Nevada. The agreement was made on January 28, 2026.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, McEwen Inc. (“McEwen”) and Golden Lake Exploration Inc. (“Golden Lake”) disclosed a notable agreement in Toronto and Vancouver, British Columbia. The agreement entails McEwen acquiring all outstanding shares of Golden Lake through a plan of arrangement, thus making Golden Lake a subsidiary of McEwen. The companies involved are listed as McEwen on NYSE/TSX with code MUX and Golden Lake on CSE with code GLM. This strategic move marks a significant development in the financial landscape and has generated interest among investors. The agreement is subject to the finalization of the transaction details and relevant approvals.

data.title: Comstock Inc. prices $50M public offering of 18.18M shares, with option for 2.73M more shares, led by existing and new institutional investors.
data.description: Today in Virginia City, Nevada, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 18,181,819 shares of common stock, all to be sold by the company. The total gross proceeds anticipated from this offering are around $50 million before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. Additionally, Comstock has provided the underwriter with a 30-day option to purchase up to an extra 2,727,272 shares to account for over-allotments, if any, at the per share public offering price, minus discounts and commissions. This offering is backed by the Company's main existing shareholders and several new institutional investors.

data.title: Applied Computing and KBR to debut INSITE 3.0, AI platform for efficient ammonia production. (Character count: 86)
data.description: In Goa, India, on January 29, 2026, India Energy Week partners Applied Computing and KBR, Inc. unveiled INSITE 3.0, an innovative AI platform. This technology aims to enhance ammonia production by promoting low emissions, energy efficiency, and reliability. The platform, developed by UK-based professionals, offers a cutting-edge solution for the industry.
